title: The Big Picture: Upside, downside
summary:
Main
By Henry Curra
Risks to our outlook
We still see ourselves in the midst of a cyclical tanker market upturn that has years to run. But recent revisions to our forecast say more clearly than ever: if you are in the market, enjoy the ride or charter out before term charter rates fall further. Here are some common challenges to our key assumptions.
